subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, my God and the God of the worlds, my Beloved and the Beloved of them that know Thee! I render praise unto Thee for having made me to know Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی و اله العالمین و محبوبی و محبوب العارفین احمدک بما عرفتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
